message:
fix(core): simplify replay delay calculation and remove dead code

The previous timestamp lookup in next_frame() had an unreachable else
branch (frame_index > 0 was always true when reached) and used an
indirect iter().next_back() to find the preceding event. Simplify to
a direct index access (events[frame_index - 1]) which is equivalent
and clearer. Fix misleading "previous non-skipped" comment — the delay
intentionally preserves real-time cadence relative to the immediately
preceding event in the original recording, including filtered events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
